hours.closed: We are closed — we open {day} at {time}

hero.title: The world on your terms
hero.intro: creators of your journeys for over 15 years

intro.heading: Every journey starts with a feeling
intro.p1: The world is vast and full of places worth experiencing. But we are surrounded by too much information: see this, do that, don’t miss this. The more choice we have, the more easily we feel lost. And rarely does anyone ask the question that matters most — how do you want to feel while you travel?
intro.p2: We create wholly personalised journeys, with no ready-made templates and no off-the-shelf packages. Whether you’re a couple in search of adventure, a family wanting to explore the world together or a solo traveller after something extraordinary, we shape every detail around you. So let’s begin. Let’s create something truly special.

explore.title: Explore our trips
explore.subtitle: Uncommon experiences that inspire the mind.

about.valuesTitle: Three principles we never depart from
about.howCta: It starts with a single conversation
about.regenP1: A fuller account of our commitments is on its way.
about.regenP2: In the meantime, we’d be glad to talk through how we work with local hosts, guides and communities on every journey.
about.trustLabel: Trusted by travellers and partners across the Balkans
about.teamTitle: The people who plan your journey
about.teamIntro: A small studio of wanderers and planners. Final names, photos and stories will live here soon.
about.awardsTitle: A little recognition along the way
about.awardsIntro: The awards and accreditations we're proud of will be listed here.
about.pressIntro: Selected places our work has been written about. Full coverage and links to follow.
about.testimonialsIntro: The trips we are proudest of are the ones our travellers can't stop talking about.

tripFinder.subtitle: They say the world has seven wonders. We think that's just the beginning.

destinations.title: Find your next horizon
destinations.intro: From the lakes and highlands of North Macedonia to the wider Balkans and Mediterranean — every journey planned from scratch around you.

trips.title: Journeys, start to finish
trips.intro: Complete itineraries we design and run end to end — every transfer, guide and long lunch arranged around you.
trips.empty: New itineraries are on the way. Tell us how you want to feel and we'll craft one.

browser.empty: No journeys match that feeling yet — tell us what you have in mind and we'll craft one.

regionPage.introBody: No two countries in {region} feel the same — and no two trips here should either. We design every journey around how you want to feel, from the first idea to the moment you're home. No templates, no planning fees.
regionPage.experienceSubtitle: Explore our {region} experiences based on how you want to feel and when you want to travel.

destinationPage.reassure: No planning fees · reply within 24 hours
destinationPage.tripsIntro: These journeys are only a starting point. Yours we will build around what you want, adjusting and refining it until it becomes exactly what you had in mind.

experiencesPage.tripsIntro: A few journeys to spark ideas — each tailored, altered and refined until it's yours.
experiencesPage.heroSub: Tell us about your perfect journey. Everything else is ours to take care of.
experiencesPage.introLead: A journey is more than a destination.
experiencesPage.introBody: Whether you're planning a family safari, a romantic honeymoon or a solo adventure, our team builds a wholly personalised programme around what you're after — to satisfy your urge to explore. To follow your passions. To push your own limits.
experiencesPage.introClose: We are experts in the art of travel and we know every corner of the world, which makes us the right partner for the journey you've been dreaming of.

tripPage.makeYoursBody: Every journey with Bookit is tailored precisely to who you are and what you want to do. So tell us a little more about yourself and we'll create something completely made to measure.
tripPage.reassure: No planning fees · reply within 24 hours
tripPage.layoutIntroPlaceholder: Placeholder text. A short introduction to the journey will sit here — a few lines on what makes this trip particular, before the gallery and the day-by-day programme.

enquiry.sentTitle: Your enquiry is on its way
enquiry.sentBody: We’ll match you with a bookit travel expert and be in touch within 24 hours to set up a time to talk — over email, phone or video, whatever suits you. In the meantime, you can reach us any time on <phone></phone>.
enquiry.title: Your journey starts here.
enquiry.pageIntro: Send us your details through the form below and our team will be in touch shortly. We'll pair you with a Bookit travel designer who will help you plan your ideal trip.
enquiry.whereLabel: Where would you like to travel?
enquiry.whenLabel: When would you like to travel?

enquiry.commentsPlaceholder: e.g. a special occasion, any must-dos or must-avoids
enquiry.hearLabel: How did you hear about us?
enquiry.newsletter: Sign up for occasional travel inspiration from our team. No spam, unsubscribe any time.
enquiry.introChannels: We can arrange the conversation over email, phone, Viber or WhatsApp — whenever suits you best.
enquiry.introCallNow: Prefer to talk right now? Call us on <phone></phone>.
